text.title: ops-churn-prevention Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ops-churn-prevention as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agents inventing save offers exceeding 50% discount or extending trials beyond 30 days without hard constraints.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs will generate generous offers unless constrained; unconstrained offers destroy unit economics and the agent cannot see margin data.
